titleStmt.title: SII 18.131: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 131. (B.K. No. 116 of 1932-33.) HOSARITTI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This worn out inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva. Except a reference to a Mahāpradhāna (name lost) governing [Banavāsi] Twelvethousand and administering the vaḍḍarāvuḷa, no further details are available.
The characters would show that Tribhuvanamalla of the record is probably Vikramāditya VI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhaṁmūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . namastasmai varāhāya līlayā caratē mahīṁ khurāṁtaragatō ya sya mēruḥ kaṇakaṇāyatē .
jayatyāviṣkritaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnatadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrānta bhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . vāgartthāviva saṁpṛktau vāgartthapratipattayē jagataḥ pitarau vandē pārvvatīparamēśvarau .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara parama bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarā
jyamuttarōttarābhi vṛddhipravardhdhamānamācandrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svasti śrīvanitārppitavistīrṇnōrasthaḷaṁ ripuvrajamastanyastacaraṇaṁ samasta janastutasitakīrtti
vikramāditya ḷadi karidantavilagna trimūrttībhūta smaranēkachatrīkritadharātaḷaṁ sōmavaṁśacūḍāratna .
parāḷvesadoḷu vairivīrakōḷāhaḷa dapadmamadukara jitabaḷava dahitabāhubaḷavidvatu
patihitaroḷellavaggada patihita roḷu mikkatituci pparoḷati
kkaḷoḷu nivahalōḷa svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda
nagabhagna ta vaṁdibrajasaṁtarppaṇaṁ vitaraṇaviḷāsaṁ vīralakṣmīnivāsaṁ virōdhi
muda vidhu caraṇa sarasīruhamadhukara nāmādisamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahā pradhānaṁ
pannircasiramumchāṁ vaḍḍarāvuḷamumaṁ duṣṭa nigrahaviśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukhasaṁkathāvinōda
sadguṇamaṇimāḷāviḷasitaneseda gōvinda vibudha The continuation is worn
Digital edition of SII 18.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
